sql_array: CREATE TABLE db_fuzz_testing.join_example(`id` UInt32, `value` UInt32) ENGINE = Join(ANY, LEFT, id);
SELECT number, joinGet(db_fuzz_testing.join_example, 'value', toUInt32(number)) FROM numbers(5);
CREATE TABLE db_fuzz_testing.null_example(`id` UInt32, `value` UInt32) ENGINE = Join(ANY, LEFT, id) SETTINGS join_use_nulls=1;
